title: helianthemum glutinosum var. laeve
intro: Helianthemum glutinosum var. laeve, also known as rockrose or sunrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum glutinosum var. laeve include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for various herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
